metadata.title: PowerLand – Electrical & Solar Energy Solutions
metadata.description: PowerLand is a leading provider of electrical and solar energy solutions including automation, VFDs, weighing devices, spare parts, and energy quality systems.

hero.title: Powering the Future of
hero.description: PowerLand delivers comprehensive electrical and solar energy solutions — from industrial automation and VFD systems to energy quality management. Your trusted partner for smart power infrastructure.
hero.modeEnergyDesc: Complete solar and electrical energy solutions — power factor correction, harmonic filters, and smart metering for optimal energy infrastructure.
hero.modeAutomationDesc: PLC programming, SCADA systems, VFD deployment, and full-scale industrial automation engineering for manufacturing lines.
hero.stackDesc: End-to-end electrical solutions backed by authorized global partnerships with Bedford and Entes.

services.title: Our Services & Solutions
services.description: From solar energy projects to industrial automation, we provide end-to-end electrical solutions backed by world-class partnerships.

projects.title: Project Services
projects.description: Complete turnkey project solutions for solar installations, electrical infrastructure, and industrial power systems. From design to commissioning.

spareParts.title: Spare Parts
spareParts.description: Genuine spare parts and components for all electrical and automation systems. Quick delivery and competitive pricing guaranteed.

weighing.title: Weighing Devices
weighing.description: Precision industrial weighing solutions including load cells, indicators, and complete weighing systems for all industries.

automation.title: Automation
automation.description: Industrial automation solutions including PLCs, SCADA systems, HMI panels, and complete automation engineering services.

vfd.title: VFD (Bedford)
vfd.description: Variable Frequency Drives from Bedford — energy-efficient motor control solutions for industrial and commercial applications.

electrical.title: Electrical Items (Entes)
electrical.description: Premium electrical monitoring and protection devices from Entes — current transformers, analyzers, and power meters.

energy.title: Energy Quality
energy.description: Power Factor Correction (PFC), Active Harmonic Filters (AHF), and Static Var Generators (SVG) for optimal energy quality.

partners.title: Official Authorized Partner
partners.description: We are the official authorized partners of leading global brands in power electronics and electrical monitoring.

bedford.name: Bedford Inverters
bedford.description: Global leader in Variable Frequency Drives and inverter technology for industrial motor control and energy efficiency.

entes.name: Entes
entes.description: World-renowned manufacturer of electrical measurement, monitoring, and protection devices for power distribution systems.

about.title: Your Trusted Energy Partner
about.description: PowerLand is a leading electrical and solar energy company specializing in industrial power solutions. With years of experience and authorized partnerships with global brands like Bedford and Entes, we deliver reliable, efficient, and innovative solutions for businesses across the region.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Ready to power your next project? Reach out to our team for consultation, quotes, or technical support.
